rulings.Case Title: QUINTANA VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED CHISM DECLARATION CREATES TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE/CAUSATION. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: TANDU VS MERCEDES-BENZ USA INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Seek Relief From Entry Of Judgement
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL ORDER. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: PADILLA VS COLONIAL LIFE & ACCIDENT INS
rulings.Rulings: COLONIAL'S DEMURRER: - OVERRULE AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 3, 4, & 8. AMENDED COMPLAINT PROPERLY PLEADS NEGLIGENCE & COVERAGE BY ESTOPPEL. See Butcher v. Truck Ins. Exchange, (2000) 77 Cal.App.4th 1442, 1461. OVERRULE AS TO 5 BECAUSE AMENDED COMPLAINT HAS SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 6 BECAUSE REDUNDANT OF 4. OVERRULE AS TO 7. AMENDED COMPLAINT PLEADS OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. OVERRULE SPECIAL DEMURRER. See Anaya v. Sup. Crt., (1984) 160 Cal.App.3d 228, 231, fn.1. STEIER'S DEMURRER - SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 & 8. OVERRULE AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: ABRAHAM VS HALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Motion For Leave To File Xcomplaint
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED NO OPPOSITION FILED. (NR)

rulings.Case Title: ABRAHAM VS HALL

rulings.Case Title: MILLIKIN VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

rulings.Case Title: MCCLELLAN VS BRISTOL HOTEL MANAGEMENT
rulings.Rulings: OVERRULE AS TO PREMISES LIABILITY CAUSE OF ACTION. AMENDED COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY PLEADS THAT THE SHOOTING OCCURRED ON PREMISES IN DEFENDANTS' CONTROL. OVERRULE AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BROOKS' WRONGFUL DEATH CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE BROOKS LACKS STANDING. (PB)
